name: aryna Khrystyianyn
webdev: Fullstack developer with AI integration experience
aboutTitel: I write code with love and logic.
aboutText: I combine creativity with a logical mindset to bring ideas to life. I love turning abstract concepts into real, working products, always paying attention to the details that make them special. Driven by kindness and curiosity. I strive to create projects that matter.
aboutPhilosophy1: You can easily find information about where I studied, what I have done, and where I have worked in my CV.
aboutPhilosophy2: Here, I would like to share something more personal – what I love and what inspires me to be a web developer.
aboutPhilosophy3: I love nature – just as God created it. I love to notice small details, to see beauty in simple things. I’m fascinated by the power and majesty I see in nature – mighty mountains, vast forests, the rainbow after the rain. I love walking, breathing fresh air, and thinking about how wonderfully God created everything.
aboutPhilosophy4: God created the world by His Word. And programming is, in a way, also creating through words. With code – with words – we create projects and websites. God created humans in His image, and it’s natural for us, too, to create.
aboutPhilosophy5: God made great things – 🌍 the earth, the universe, life itself. And yet He cares about the smallest details – every 🌸  flower in the field, even the one that might be eaten by  🐄 a cow. Still, it is beautiful, full of color, shape, and harmony.
aboutPhilosophy6: Just as there is the visible and invisible in nature, there is the frontend and backend in web development. Behind what the user sees, there is a lot of unseen work that makes everything function.
aboutPhilosophy7: By admiring the Creator, I too want to create – things that are beautiful, meaningful, and alive.
projectsDescription: Here I showcase some of my web projects – modern, responsive, and built with love for coding.
contactText: I'm always glad to hear honest words, meet inspiring ideas, and connect with kind souls.
cheeseSpecial: This project is very special to me because it combines my passion for cheese making and modern web development.
adminDesc: Manage recipes and products, process orders, change statuses
regUserDesc: Create own cheese batches, track ripening, view recipes and add to favorites
unregUserDesc: View recipes & general information, buy products
diary: Cheese diary: personal entries for each cheese batch
timeline: Ripening timeline: shows when each cheese is ready
shop: Online shop: ingredients, starter cultures, equipment & additives
personalPages: Personal pages: gallery of produced cheeses for each cheesemaker
recipeDb: Recipe database: add, browse & save recipes
aiChatbot: AI-Chatbot (RAG): intelligent assistant with knowledge base for recipes, ripening & cheesemaking
openaiDesc: AI model for generating answers in the chatbot
mobileDiary: On-the-go diary: entry access from anywhere
mobilePhotos: Instant photos: capture and upload directly from camera
themeSupport: Theme support: seamless switch between Light and Dark modes
ripeningTracker: Ripening Tracker: Visual progress scale for each batch directly in the list
cheesemakerStats: Cheesemaker Stats: Overview of total batches, ready cheese, and personal records
recipeReference: Recipe Reference: Quick access to your favorite recipes from your phone
nailDescription: A professional full-stack website for a nail studio featuring an online booking system and a comprehensive administrative dashboard. Developed in just 3 days using AI-assisted engineering, this project showcases rapid delivery and robust architecture.
nailBooking: Online Booking: easy scheduling for beauty services
nailAdmin: Admin Hub: manage prices, working hours, and salon details
nailGallery: Portfolio Management: dynamic gallery with image upload capabilities
nailAppointments: Appointment Manager: real-time tracking and processing of client bookings
nailMultilingual: Multilingual: full support for English, German, and Ukrainian
nailThreeDays: High-Efficiency Dev: fully functional MVP built in 3 days using AI (Antigravity)
nailFullStack: Full-Stack Power: Next.js frontend/backend with PostgreSQL database
eInvoiceDescription: An advanced AI-powered invoice processing orchestrator developed during an internship at fintom8. Built with Google GECX and MCP servers, this 'Root Agent' manages complex subagent workflows to validate, convert, and explain e-invoices according to EN 16931 standards. This project participated in the Google AI Student Hackathon — Warsaw on March 3, 2026.
eInvoiceRootRole: Root Agent Orchestration: Coordinating 4 specialized subagents for complex workflows
eInvoiceMCP: MCP Server Integration: Connecting AI agents with enterprise server tools and data
eInvoiceCompliance: Regulatory Compliance: Ensuring 100% adherence to EN 16931 e-invoicing standards
eInvoiceWidget: Smart Web Widget: Integrated AI assistant for corporate web environments
eInvoiceLogic: Advanced Prompt Engineering: High-precision instructions and tool-use constraints
eInvoiceConversion: Dynamic Data Conversion: Transforming any input format (JSON, Text) into valid XML
mobileAppIntro1: Cheese with love Diary is a logical extension of the
mobileAppIntro2: . This mobile app uses the website's backend and is fully integrated with it.
mobileAppPersonal: Since cheesemaking is my hobby, this app is primarily useful for me personally. I plan to use it regularly because it's much easier to enter notes and track progress via a phone, and it's a great way to showcase my cheesemaking skills to others.
stayTimePhilosophy: Beyond the store's functionality, my primary goal was to intentionally step away from frameworks like React to master the fundamental building blocks of the web—working directly with the language as it was designed.
stayTimeLearning: Through this project, I gained a deep understanding of the HTML structure, DOM manipulation, and how web elements truly function under the hood. While modern stores aren't built this way today, this 'back-to-basics' challenge provided a powerful foundation for my growth as a developer, showcasing my resourcefulness and commitment to understanding the core of technology.
stayTimeVanilla: Vanilla JS Core: Logic built entirely without frameworks to master the language
stayTimeDOM: Direct DOM Manipulation: Deep understanding of how to interact with and update the UI
stayTimeStorage: Local Storage: Managing shopping cart state and persistence on the client side
stayTimeSass: SASS Integration: Advanced styling with variables, nesting, and modular architecture
stayTimeTS: TypeScript: Added type safety to the vanilla codebase for robust development
stayTimeStripe: Stripe Integration: Experience with payment gateways for e-commerce
todoPhilosophy: This project marks the very beginning of my journey into React. It serves as a personal milestone, reminding me of where I started and how far I have come in a short period of time.
todoSoftSkills: While technically simpler than my later works, this project reflects my persistence and systematic approach to learning. It showcases my ability to quickly grasp fundamental concepts like component architecture and state management, laying the groundwork for more complex applications.
todoState: State Management: Implementing useContext and useReducer for predictable data flow
todoRouting: Client-Side Routing: Dynamic navigation using React Router
todoStyling: Modern Styling: Leveraging Tailwind CSS for a clean and responsive interface
todoVite: Vite & TS: Using modern build tools and TypeScript from the very start
